stemHtml:
The ATC instructs the pilot of an aircraft flying in IMC and over mountainous terrain to descend from FL100 to FL70. The temperature is ISA +15°C and the QNH, reported from a nearby airfield with an elevation of 300 ft, is 975 hPa. What is the true altitude at FL70 that the pilot must use to confirm a safe terrain clearance before descending to the new flight level?

Use 1 hPa = 30 ft
